articles.title: Did you follow the local news this week? Take our Greater Boston news quiz.
articles.description:
Mass. millionaire money, Bruce’s Boston memories, and a royal visit are all part of this week’s news quiz.

The post Did you follow the local news this week? Take our Greater Boston news quiz. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts millionaire tax discussions continue to affect local funding initiatives.
Bruce Springsteen's Boston memories highlighted in recent local news quiz.
Royal visit planned for Boston, expected to boost tourism and local businesses.

articles.title: The Hilltop Steak House family is parting ways with their eclectic 1970s house
articles.description:
The children of Frank and Irene Giuffrida, the founders of the famous restaurant on Route 1 in Saugus, are selling their Lynnfield home.

The post The Hilltop Steak House family is parting ways with their eclectic 1970s house appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Giuffrida family is selling their 1970s home in Lynnfield.
Frank and Irene Giuffrida founded the iconic Hilltop Steak House in Saugus.
This sale marks a significant change for a family tied to Boston's dining history.
